What is Quiv

One agent.
Infinite reach.

Quiv Network is built around a single premise: an AI agent that operates completely independently — requesting data, paying for access, and delivering results without human intervention at any step. Powered by the x402 protocol, Quiv signs USDC micropayments directly into HTTP requests. No subscriptions. No API keys. No waiting.

How It Works

Four steps.
Zero friction.

01
Request
Quiv sends a standard HTTP request to any paid endpoint on the open web.
02
402 Response
Server replies with HTTP 402 and full payment instructions.
03
Pay
Quiv signs a USDC authorization using EIP-3009 and retries instantly.
04
Deliver
Server verifies on-chain and returns the resource. No human touched it.

Why It Matters

Built for the
agentic economy.

01
Autonomous Payments
Quiv pays for every API call independently, in real time, without human approval.
02
x402 Native
Built on the open HTTP payment standard backed by Coinbase, Cloudflare, and Google.
03
Zero Custody Risk
Quiv holds only the USDC it needs per session. No pooled funds. No exposure.
04
Real-Time Settlement
Every payment settles on-chain in under two seconds. No invoices. No waiting.
05
Pay-Per-Use
No subscriptions. Quiv pays only for what it consumes, when it consumes it.
06
$QUIV Token
Hold $QUIV to access and operate the Quiv agent. The token is the key.
